title: Siemens India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Siemens India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Siemens India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!
